steps.clue: Complete two Hermit trials and place the four dials.
Collect the three offerings and retrieve the Vril Vessel.
Return the three orange orbs and take the Seal of Duality.
Charge the Seal at the blue campfire with Samantha's Music Box.
Process the two Soapstones and use the fuse to obtain the Elemental Shard.
Repeat the orb and campfire sequence, then charge the Seal at four Pack-a-Punch sites.
Charge the Seal at Golden Pack-a-Punch and escort it to Human Infusion.
Deliver the Agarthan Device to the Hermit and enter the final portal.
